title: Melody Mimic
short_description: Maestro Macaw plays a tune on the glowing pads — listen, then echo it back. Each round adds a note, training your musical ear and memory.
description: Maestro Macaw plays a melody on the glowing musical pads — listen closely, then play it back note for note! Every round the tune grows by one note, so it trains your musical ear, pitch memory and listening skills, Simon-style, using pleasant pentatonic notes that always sound good together. Grade bands ramp from four pads at a gentle pace, to a quicker four-pad tempo, to six speedy pads for grade 4–5. Turn the sound on for the full concert. A free online music, listening and ear-training game for kids in grades 1–5, with every echoed note feeding your score and GP.
controls: Sound ON. Watch and listen to the pads light up, then tap them back in the same order.
